owner.name: Usman Iqbal
owner.title: Salesforce Administrator & Developer
owner.bio: I work across Salesforce administration, Salesforce development, CRM customization, automation, reports, dashboards, websites, AI bots, and Android apps. My focus is helping businesses move faster with systems that are clean, reliable, and easy to use.
owner.availability: Available for new CRM and automation projects

projects.title: NURAXTECH Website
projects.description: A premium brand website for CRM, automation, web, AI bot, and app development services.

projects.title: Salesforce CRM Automation
projects.description: Automated lead assignment, reminders, dashboards, and workflow logic for sales teams.

projects.title: Jotform to Salesforce Lead Integration
projects.description: A direct lead capture pipeline that sends validated Jotform submissions into Salesforce.

projects.title: Android Student Management System
projects.description: A mobile system for student records, attendance, academic data, and administrative tasks.

projects.title: AI Revenue Checker Bot
projects.description: A smart bot that checks revenue data, answers business questions, and flags insights.

projects.title: Store Management POS System
projects.description: Inventory, sales, reports, and daily store operations in one clean management system.

projects.title: FormFill Pro PDF Automation
projects.description: Automated PDF generation and form filling for repeat documents and business paperwork.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A fast, responsive portfolio with smooth animations, modern design, and editable content.

services.title: Salesforce CRM Setup
services.description: Objects, fields, page layouts, users, security, pipelines, and clean CRM foundations.

services.title: Salesforce Automation
services.description: Flows, approvals, alerts, assignments, reminders, and end-to-end workflow automation.

services.title: Reports & Dashboards
services.description: Executive-ready dashboards, business metrics, sales visibility, and reporting systems.

services.title: Litify Customization
services.description: Matter management, intake flows, legal CRM customization, and process optimization.

services.title: Website Development
services.description: Responsive business websites, landing pages, portfolios, and modern web experiences.

services.title: Android App Development
services.description: Android apps for operations, student systems, business tracking, and internal tools.

services.title: AI Bots Development
services.description: Custom chatbots, lead qualification assistants, automation agents, and support bots.

services.title: CRM Integrations
services.description: Jotform, websites, forms, APIs, and third-party tools connected into CRM workflows.

services.title: Business Automation
services.description: Automated pipelines, document workflows, notifications, data sync, and admin systems.

services.title: Portfolio Websites
services.description: Premium personal brands, developer portfolios, service pages, and lead-focused websites.
